prediction.reasoning: For a 1-day prediction, the current price often serves as the best point estimate due to the very short time horizon and absence of immediate market-moving catalysts. The confidence intervals are calculated using a projected daily standard deviation (volatility) of approximately $1.47 (derived from an annualized volatility assumption of ~22% for DIS) and standard statistical Z-scores for each confidence level, assuming a log-normal distribution of daily returns around the point estimate.
